title: The Railways (Employment of Members of the Armed Forces) Act, 1965
full_text: The Railways (Employment of Members of the Armed Forces) Act, 1965 रेल (सशस्‍त्र-बल-सदस्‍य-नियोजन) अधिनियम, 1965 Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: 196540 Act Number: 40 Enactment Date: 1965-12-03 Act Year: 1965 Short Title: The Railways (Employment of Members of the Armed Forces) Act, 1965 Hindi Title: रेल (सशस्‍त्र-बल-सदस्‍य-नियोजन) अधिनियम, 1965 Long Title: An Act to make certain provisions relating to the employment of members of the Armed Forces of the Union in the working and management of railways. Ministry: Ministry of Railways Enforcement Date: 03-12-1965 TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles The Railways (Employment of Members of the Armed Forces) Act, 1965 Show all section Section 1. Short title and extent. Section 2. Interpretation. Section 3. Employment of members of Armed Forces of the Union to assist a railway administration in connection with the service of a railway. Section 4. Employment of members of Armed Forces of the Union to replace railway administration in working a railway. Section 5. Repeal and saving.
